steps.title: Identify the causal requirement
steps.content: The key signal is “and thereby allow them to instead focus on identifying sound business opportunities.” The word instead reveals that worries currently prevent investors from focusing on opportunities. The blank must describe an action that eliminates or reduces those worries.

steps.title: Apply to the choices
steps.content: Assuage means to calm or soothe worry — the action that frees investors' attention for analyzing opportunities. The other choices either intensify the problem (amplify) or don't meaningfully affect worries (designate, convey). This matches the correct answer — D is correct.
